## Helpers.createConfectionVersionId() function

Creates and validates a confection version ID from component parts. Uses converter to ensure the formatted ID is valid.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createConfectionVersionId(parts: {
    collectionId: ConfectionId;
    itemId: ConfectionVersionSpec;
}): Result<ConfectionVersionId>;
```
